repos.name: Lum1104/Understand-Anything
repos.desc: Graphs that teach > graphs that impress. Turn any code into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and more.

repos.name: anthropics/knowledge-work-plugins
repos.desc: Open source repository of plugins primarily intended for knowledge workers to use in Claude Cowork

repos.name: rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch
repos.desc: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.

repos.name: affaan-m/ECC
repos.desc: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

repos.name: mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills
repos.desc: 754 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · Mapped to 5 frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND & NIST AI RMF · agentskills.io standard · Works with Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI & 20+ platforms · 26 security domains · Apache 2.0

repos.name: colbymchenry/codegraph
repos.desc: Pre-indexed code knowledge graph for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, and Hermes Agent — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local

repos.name: manaflow-ai/cmux
repos.desc: Ghostty-based macOS terminal with vertical tabs and notifications for AI coding agents

repos.name: multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills
repos.desc: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.

repos.name: Fincept-Corporation/FinceptTerminal
repos.desc: FinceptTerminal is a modern finance application offering advanced market analytics, investment research, and economic data tools, designed for interactive exploration and data-driven decision-making in a user-friendly environment.

repos.name: paperless-ngx/paperless-ngx
repos.desc: A community-supported supercharged document management system: scan, index and archive all your documents

repos.name: anthropics/claude-cookbooks
repos.desc: A collection of notebooks/recipes showcasing some fun and effective ways of using Claude.

repos.name: Leonxlnx/taste-skill
repos.desc: Taste-Skill - gives your AI good taste. stops the AI from generating boring, generic slop

repos.name: moeru-ai/airi
repos.desc: 💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's altitude. Capable of realtime voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio playing. Web / macOS / Windows supported.

repos.name: shiyu-coder/Kronos
repos.desc: Kronos: A Foundation Model for the Language of Financial Markets

repos.name: Axorax/awesome-free-apps
repos.desc: Curated list of the best free apps for PC and mobile

repos.name: hardikpandya/stop-slop
repos.desc: A skill file for removing AI tells from prose

repos.name: garrytan/gstack
repos.desc: Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA
